zh.lifeSummary: 當Jehanne de Rollancourt於1107年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特時，她的父親Hugues II de Rollancourt35歲，母親Jeanne de Blingel25歲。她於1124年與Louis de Bours de Bournonville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1159年在法國米迪-列內斯豪-列內斯布爾斯享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jehanne de Rollancourt于1107年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特时，她的父亲Hugues II de Rollancourt35岁，母亲Jeanne de Blingel25岁。她于1124年与Louis de Bours de Bournonville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1159年在法国米迪-列內斯豪-列內斯布爾斯享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jehanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joanne
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Jehanne de Rollancourt was born in 1107, in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Hugues II de Rollancourt, was 35 and her mother, Jeanne de Blingel, was 25. She married Louis de Bours de Bournonville in 1124. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1159, in Bours, Hautes-Pyrénées, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jehanne de Rollancourt est née en 1107, à Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Hugues II de Rollancourt, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Blingel, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Louis de Bours de Bournonville en 1124. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1159, à Bours, Hautes-Pyrénées, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jehanne de Rollancourt 1107 in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues II de Rollancourt 35 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Blingel 25. Sie hat 1124 Louis de Bours de Bournonville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1159 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Bours, Hautes-Pyrénées, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jehanne de Rollancourt è nata il nel 1107 nel Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Hugues II de Rollancourt, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Blingel, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Louis de Bours de Bournonville nel 1124. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1159, nel Bours, Hautes-Pyrénées, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jehanne de Rollancourtが1107年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスロランコウルトで生まれた時，父Hugues II de Rollancourtは35歳，母Jeanne de Blingelは25歳であった。1124年にLouis de Bours de Bournonvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1159年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスハウテス-プイルeンeスボウルズで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jehanne de Rollancourt(이)가 1107년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 롤랭쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues II de Rollancourt(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Blingel(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1124년 Louis de Bours de Bournonville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1159년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하츠-p이ee스 부르스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jehanne de Rollancourt nasceu em 1107, em Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Hugues II de Rollancourt, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Blingel, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Louis de Bours de Bournonville em 1124. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1159, em Bours, Hautes-Pyrénées, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jehanne de Rollancourt родилась в 1107 г. в местности ролланкоурт, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues II de Rollancourt было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Blingel, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis de Bours de Bournonville в 1124 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1159 г. в местности бурс, хаутес-пирeнeесь, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jehanne de Rollancourt nació en 1107, en Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Hugues II de Rollancourt, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Blingel, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Louis de Bours de Bournonville en 1124. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1159, en Bours, Hautes-Pyrénées, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
